title: Pairwise Ranking Prompting: Pointwise and Listwise?

defines.name: Pairwise Ranking Prompting (PRP)
defines.definition: A prompting paradigm that ranks documents by asking an LLM to compare a query with pairs of candidate documents.

problem: Existing pointwise and listwise LLM ranking prompts are too hard for off-the-shelf LLMs and often underperform strong fine-tuned rankers.
